problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Autophagy. Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
